name: A 4 & 20 Meat Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all base ingredients thoroughly. Roll out to about 1/8 inch thickness.
2. Roll out puff pastry to 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Sauté the beef. Dissolve the stock cube in the water, add to beef. Season to taste. Sprinkle with flour and cook until flour is browned and incorporated well.
4. Adjust seasoning and coloring to taste.
5. Make pies by placing scoops of about 1/4 cup on the base crust. Egg glaze around the filling and top with puff pastry, using egg glaze as glue (try not to leave large air pockets).
6. Cut around the filling, creating individual pies. Brush the top with more egg glaze for color.
7. Bake at 350 degrees until puffed and browned.
